integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS via the web browser GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web application (e.g., clicking edit buttons, using dropdowns for department/title) rather than using terminal commands, curl, or direct database edits.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the verified roster file to determine the correct information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/hr_verified_roster.txt' in a text editor (like gedit, nano) or viewing it via terminal commands (like cat or less).

integrity.description: The agent did not modify employee records that already matched the roster.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the employee list or edit screens should not show the agent altering the department or title of employees other than EMP003, EMP007, EMP011, and EMP015.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires correcting exactly 4 employee records in Sentrifugo based on the roster. The correct values are: 1) EMP003 (David Nguyen): Dept = 'Finance & Accounting', Title = 'Finance Manager'. 2) EMP007 (Robert Patel): Dept = 'Data Science', Title = 'Senior Data Scientist'. 3) EMP011 (Matthew Garcia): Dept = 'Marketing', Title = 'Marketing Specialist'. 4) EMP015 (Kevin Hernandez): Dept = 'DevOps & Infrastructure', Title = 'Systems Engineer'. Scoring is 15 points per correct department and 10 points per correct title.
